name: Y R Transportation
recent_news: FMCSA/SAFER lists YR Transportation Inc (USDOT 1012359, MC 425687) as a property carrier with ~2-5 trucks and 2-7 drivers based in Stockton; no school-bus or pupil-transport authority indicated.
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus / student-transport operator. YR Transportation is a small freight/property trucking carrier in Stockton — out of scope for Summit tuck-in. Recommend drop from target list.

name: Advanced Medtrans Inc
districts_or_customers: retirement / SNF / rehab facilities (San Fernando Valley / LA)
recent_news: No M&A or material news found; operates as a small DOT-licensed NEMT provider out of Northridge serving the San Fernando Valley with a BBB profile and ~13 Yelp reviews.
fit_notes: Pure NEMT (non-emergency medical transport) micro-operator with no evidence of school-district or SPED routing contracts. Too small and off-thesis (NEMT, not yellow-bus / SPED contractor) to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in.

name: Global Paratransit
owner_or_parent: independent (private CA corporation; explicitly states not a subsidiary of any other company)
fleet_size_est: large fleet supporting ~5,300 trips/day, 150K pax/month, ~1.9M pax/yr (est. several hundred vehicles)
districts_or_customers: City of South Gate Get Around Town Express
recent_news: Largest paratransit subcontractor for Access Services in LA County Southern Region; ~25 years in business with consistent municipal/transit contract base. No M&A activity disclosed.
fit_notes: Genuinely large, independent SoCal paratransit operator — but business is ADA/municipal transit (Access LA, dial-a-ride) NOT K-12 school bus or SPED home-to-school routing. Adjacent to Summit's thesis (special-needs transport / wheelchair-accessible fleet, vehicle maint., call center scale) but core revenue is transit-agency contracts, not school districts. Could be a sizeable strategic/diversification tuck-in if Summit wants paratransit-adjacent revenue; otherwise out-of-scope for pure K-12 school-bus consolidation.

name: Arizona Medical Transport LLC
recent_news: NPI 1659407864 registered Feb 2007; BBB-listed NEMT van provider; no acquisition or growth news found.
fit_notes: Pure NEMT van micro-operator in Tucson — no school-district contracts identified. Too small and off-thesis for Summit (school-bus / SPED platform). Recommend drop from target list.

name: Devine Towncar & Limousine
districts_or_customers: Houston / Katy / Sugar Land / Missouri City / Galveston / Richmond TX retail and corporate customers
recent_news: No M&A or operating news; small owner-operated limo company founded by Tolu Kuku after several years as a cab driver.
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus / SPED operator. Devine is a small limo / town-car chauffeur service in the Houston suburbs with no school-district contracts. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in — recommend drop from target list.
